name: Tangy Mashed Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Red-skinned potatoes, scrubbed and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water until just cooked through.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, dill, vinegar, pepper and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and toss thoroughly. (The salad can be prepared to this point up to one day ahead. Cover and refrigerate, but return it to room temperature before serving.)
4. Stir in the onions and adjust the seasoning before serving.
